2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 39 vi) BFP motor a) Bearings 1 set* b) Dust seal and gaskets etc. 2 sets* 9.2.27 Lubricating Oil System for Motor Driven BFP i) Lubricating oil pumps (set comprising of pump or pumps 1 set* alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirements of one motor driven BFP) ii) DC emergency oil pump (set comprising of pump or pumps 1 set* alongwith motor required to meet the 100%operational requirement of one motor driven BFP) iii) Lub oil/ working oil coolers (for each type and size) Seals, gaskets, ’O’ rings etc. 2 sets* iv) Duplex oil filters/ strainers (for each type and size) 2 sets* (complete set consisting of cartridges, gaskets, ‘O’ rings except housing) 9.2.28 Lubricating Oil System for Turbine Driven BFPs i) Auxiliary oil pumps (set comprising of pump or pumps 1 set* alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirements of one turbine driven BFP) ii) DC emergency oil pump including motor (set comprising of 1 set* pump or pumps alongwith motor required to meet the 100% operational requirement of one turbine driven BFP) iii) Jacking oil pump including motor (set comprising of pump or
